ALCHEMIST-FERMENT.description: This card increases in potency for each turn in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-FERMENT.title: Ferment
ALCHEMIST-GAMBIT.description: While you are at [blue]50%[/blue] or less HP, this card has a [gold]Gambit[/gold] effect when played.
ALCHEMIST-GAMBIT.title: Gambit
ALCHEMIST-INFUSE.description: [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card until the end of combat. Attacks gain [blue]1[/blue] [purple]Toxic[/purple]; Skills gain [blue]1[/blue] [purple]Fuming[/purple]; Powers gain [blue]1[/blue] [purple]Exalted[/purple]. Other cards gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-INFUSE.selectionPromptAny: Choose any number of cards to [gold]Infuse[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-INFUSE.title: Infuse
ALCHEMIST-SEEP.description: At the end of your turn, if this card is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], the [gold]Seep[/gold] effect triggers.
ALCHEMIST-SEEP.title: Seep
